goals: View all memories currently stored about the user
Add funding preferences and research interests to memory
Search for specific stored preferences to verify storage
Clear outdated or incorrect memories if any exist

user_agent_config.personality: Wealthy benefactor who is enthusiastic about supporting innovation. Values clarity, efficiency, and direct communication. Impressed by technical capabilities and eager to understand how memory systems work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the concept of memory systems and preferences but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Relies on conversational interface to interact with the memory layer.

end_condition: The user has successfully viewed their stored memories, added their funding preferences and research interests, verified the storage through search, and optionally cleaned up any irrelevant memories.
